app.title: Hermes Task Board
col.desc.draft: Notes & ideas you haven't committed to yet.
col.desc.execute: Currently running — Hermes is on it.
col.desc.verify: Needs your review or a follow-up question.
col.desc.archive: Retired. Drag here to move out of sight.
field.title: Title
dep.hint: This task will stay in Plan until every dependency reaches at least the state selected. Verify means the depended-on task finished its attempts (waiting for your review); Done means you've accepted it.
placeholder.title: What needs doing?
placeholder.description: Optional. Markdown supported. Paste or drop images.
placeholder.tags: Type a tag, hit Enter — old ones autocomplete
attempt.heading: Attempts
confirm.new_attempt.title: Start a new attempt?
confirm.new_attempt.body: This dispatches the task to Hermes as a fresh session. Only use this when the previous attempt needs to be redone from scratch — otherwise ask a follow-up question on the existing attempt.
editor.hint: Tip: paste, drop, or pick an image — it will be uploaded and a Markdown reference inserted.
editor.hint_no_upload: Image uploads are disabled: Hermes forwards the description verbatim to its LLM provider, which cannot fetch images served from this host. Configure Aliyun OSS in Settings → Integrations to enable image uploads.
editor.image_disabled_alert: Image upload is disabled. Configure an image host (Settings → Integrations → Aliyun OSS) so the image URL is reachable from Hermes's LLM provider.
settings.servers_helper: Each registered Hermes Server can hold multiple model profiles. Concurrency limits apply per server and per profile.
settings.models_helper: Each row is an agent profile on this Hermes server — the Hermes gateway calls them "model" in its API but conceptually they are agent profiles with distinct system prompts, tool sets, or personalities. Profile-level max_concurrent defaults to 5.
settings.archive_days: Auto-purge archive after N days (0 = never)
settings.oss_helper: Aliyun OSS is used as an image host for task descriptions. When disabled, images are stored locally under data/uploads/ and served by this server.
settings.oss_enable: Use Aliyun OSS for image uploads
settings.auth_intro_off: Password login is disabled. Enable it to require a username and password for everyone.
settings.auth_intro_on: Password login is enabled — signed in as {u}.
th.name: Name
login.title: Sign in
login.first_time_hint: To enable password login, open the app first and go to Settings → Access control.
